name: Artichoke Dip 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine equal amounts of Parmesan cheese and mayonnaise in a bowl.
2. Add garlic powder to the mixture.
3. Add artichoke hearts to the bowl and stir until combined with the cheese mixture.
4. Serve cold or heat for 10 to 20 minutes at 350°F (175°C) in an oven, until the cheese is melted. Do not heat in a microwave.
5. Serve with chips or as a spread on French bread.
